description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service (experimental, mtu 1300) and variables BUILDX_URL, DOCKER_CLI_EXPERIMENTAL, DOCKER_HUB, DOCKER_HUB_USER, HUB_IMAGE, PLATFORMS. Define a single stage build and a global before_script that exports IMAGE_NAME, logs into the GitLab Container Registry, installs docker-buildx from $BUILDX_URL, enables binfmt, creates a multiarch builder named multiarch for $PLATFORMS, inspects it, and defines a get_latest_version function that extracts the .version file from the latest image. Add a buildx.gitlab job (except master, only branches) that runs docker buildx build -t "$IMAGE_NAME:latest" --push --platform "$PLATFORMS" . and then docker buildx build -t "$IMAGE_NAME:$(get_latest_version)" --push --platform "$PLATFORMS" . in the build stage. Add a buildx.hub job (only master) that runs the same first build command, then sets VERSION=$(get_latest_version), logs into Docker Hub with $DOCKER_HUB_USER/$DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD, and runs docker buildx build -t "$HUB_IMAGE:latest" -t "$HUB_IMAGE:$VERSION" --push --platform "$PLATFORMS" . also in the build stage. Both jobs push images to the GitLab registry and the hub job additionally pushes to Docker Hub.
